characters.name: Afa
characters.description: Afa LefitiAppearancesLast seen"Perro/Oc"Appearances1 Episode(see below)DetailsStatusDeceasedDate of DeathSeptember 2018Cause of DeathDied from blood loss after having his arm cut offFactionBasetown TribeTitleShot callerPortrayed byPeter Navy TuiasosopoAfa Lefitiwas a shotcaller of theBasetown TribeonMayans MC, a spinoff of theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by American actorPeter Navy Tuiasosopo, Afa makes his only appearance in "Perro/Oc", inseason one. Little is known about Afa. He is a shotcaller for the Basetown Tribe and appears to be a man of Samoan descent, he has a very heavyset build and possibly was affiliated with theGalindo Cartelin some way asMiguel Galindo, speaks to Afa like he knows him. At some point before the events of this episode take place, Afa along with the Basetown Tribe are employed byLuisa "Adelita" EspinaandLos Olvidadosto hijack aMayans Motorcycle Clubdrug shipment. He didn't know the identity of who hired him. He sends in his crew and they are successful in attacking the club and stealing their load which are going to be given to Los Olvidados to sell for money for their cause.

characters.name: Ivo Alexei
characters.description: Ivo AlexeiAppearancesFirst seen"Out"Last seen"Out"Appearances1 episode(see below)DetailsStatusDeceasedCause of DeathStabbed in the ear by Otto DelaneyGenderMaleFactionRussian MafiaPortrayed byRoman MitichyanIvo Alexeiis a member of theRussian Mafiaon theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by Russian actorRoman Mitichyan, Ivo is incarcerated atStockton State Prisonand appears only on the episode "Out" in the series'fourthseason. Alexei shanksJackson 'Jax' Tellerin retaliation forSAMCRO’sdouble cross of the Russian Mafia. Sometime after the SAMCRO members were released, Alexei and his fellow Russians were jumped in the showers byMayan-affiliated hispanic inmates that were protecting the Sons. While most of the mafiosi were shanked to death, they let Alexei live. Later, he is restrained by guards and medical staff and taken to the infirmary, where he is placed in a bed next to SAMCRO memberOtto 'Big Otto' Delaney. Otto stabs Alexei in the ear with a knife, killing him.

characters.name: Alicia
characters.description: AliciaAppearancesFirst seen"Pap Struggles With The Death Angel"Last seen"Our Gang's Dark Oath"Appearances3 Episodes(see below)DetailsStatusAlivePortrayed byDenise G. SanchezAliciawas one of Vicki's girls onMayans MC, a spinoff of theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by American actressDenise G. Sanchez. Alicia makes her debut in theseason threepremiere, "Pap Struggles With The Death Angel" and plays a minor reccuring role throghout the same season. Alicia is hired by theMayans Motorcycle Club, an ally ofVicki Ariza. She has agreed to smuggle some drugs over the border hidden inside her car. She is visibly nervous, butEzekiel "EZ" Reyesassures her that everything will be fine and she will have no trouble crossing over. She solemnly explains to EZ that she really needs the $5k payment and being one of Vicki's girl's doesn't pay as well as she hoped. Alicia approaches the checkpoint and answers a few questions from the guard. Her fidgety and nervous behaviour causes the guard to flag her, and she is ordered to pull over to the side for a vehicle check. Alicia attempts to protest but the guard shrugs her off, she floors it through the checkpoint but hits a spike trap, her car spins out and she is quickly apprehended.

characters.name: Diana Alvarez
characters.description: Diana AlvarezAppearancesLast seen"Fírinne"Appearances1 episode(see below)DetailsStatusAliveGenderFemaleMarital StatusDivorcedPortrayed byMichelle DiazFamily TreeEsai Alvarez(son; deceased)Tessa Alvarez(daughter)Marcus Alvarez(Ex-husband)Diana Alvarezis the wife ofMarcus Alvarezon theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by American actressMichelle Diaz, Diana appears only on the episode "Fírinne" in the series'thirdseason. She is seen whenKozik,Piney WinstonandTig Tragercome to Alvarez's house to ask him to disappear so they could convinceHector Salazarthat they had killed him, which was one of the conditions Salazar had given before he would releaseTara KnowlesandMargaret Murphy. When Marcus sees them, he draws his gun, believing the Sons are going to attack him. Diana then comes out of the house with a shotgun. Before things get out of control however, the Sons assure the Alvarez family they are only there to talk. Marcus then hands their young daughter,Tessa Alvarezto her, and she goes back inside. ("Fírinne")

characters.name: Esai Alvarez
characters.description: Esai AlvarezAppearancesFirst seen"The Pull"Last seen"Hell Followed"Appearances2 episodes(see below)DetailsStatusDeceasedCause of DeathStabbed in the head by Happy LowmanGenderMaleFactionOaklandTitleFull PatchClub StatusInactivePortrayed byKevin AlejandroFamily TreeMarcus Alvarez(father)Diana Alvarez(step-mother)Tessa Alvarez(half-sister)Obispo Losa(first cousin, once-removed)Aiden Losa(cousin) Esai Alvarezwas a member of the Oakland charter of theMayansMotorcycle Clubon theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by American actorKevin Alejandro. Esai makes his debut on the episode "The Pull" in the series'firstseason, as the son of the Oakland charter President,Marcus Alvarez. Esai met his demise in the series' subsequent episode, "Hell Followed", in the same season. Esai was a full patched member of the Mayans Oakland charter of theMayansMotorcycle Club.

characters.name: Tessa Alvarez
characters.description: Tessa AlvarezAppearancesFirst seen"Fírinne"(Sons of Anarchy)Last seen"Her Blacks Crackle and Drag"(Mayans MC)Appearances6 Episodes(see below)DetailsStatusAliveBirthdate2010Portrayed byLillianna ValenzuelaFamily TreeMarcus Alvarez(Father)Diana Alvarez(Mother)Izzy Alvarez(Stepmother)Esai Alvarez† (Brother)Unnamed half-siblingSantiago (Adopted brother)Tessa Alvarezis the daughter ofMarcus Alvarezon theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by an unknown infant, Tessa appears in the episode "Fírinne" in the series'thirdseason. Tessa appears again on the FX original seriesMayans MC, a spinoff of the FX original seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by American-Japanese actressLillianna Valenzuela. Tessa first appears in theseason threepremiere, "Pap Struggles with the Death Angel". Tessa is the daughter ofMarcus AlvarezandDiana Alvarez. When Tessa was young, her parents separated and Tessa moved to live inSanto Padre, California with her father. Marcus remarried and Izzy Alvarez became Tessa's stepmother. Tessa also has a younger adopted brother named Santiago.

characters.name: Angus
characters.description: AngusAppearancesFirst seen"Gilead"Last seen"Gilead"Appearances1 episodes(see below)DetailsPortrayed byEvan LaiAngusis a drug dealer on theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy.  Played by American actorEvan Lai, Angus appears only on the episode "Gilead" in the series'secondseason. SAMCROmemberOpie WinstonasksLyla Dvorakto contact Angus in order to get the drugs needed to set up excommunicatedBlack Guerrilla Familymember and dealer,Venus Bell, with the help of San Jaoquin deputyVic Trammel. This will get the club protection in County Jail. Lyla hesitates, stating that every time she calls Angus to bring drugs, he won't leave until she gives him a blow job. Opie implies that she wouldn't be too upset if he never came back. After convincing Lyla to make the call, Opie robs Angus of his drugs and points a gun at him, telling him not to come back.

characters.name: Anna Linares
characters.description: Anna LinaresAppearancesFirst seen"Xbalanque"Last seen"Death of the Virgin"Appearances9 Episodes(see below)DetailsStatusDeceasedDate of DeathApril 2022Cause of DeathStabbed multiple times and then shot byAdelitaSpouse(s)Scott†FactionUS GovernmentTitleAgentPortrayed byEfrat Dor AgentAnna Linareswas a US Government Agent inMayans MC, a spinoff of theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Portrayed by Israeli actressEfrat Dor, Linares makes her debut appearance in theseason twopremiere, "Xbalanque" and plays a recurring role throughout season two,threeandfour. Linares is a no nonsense government agent working closely withLincoln Potterin his attempt to stop theGalindo CartelandLos Olvidados. A stern woman in a line of work ruled by males, she works hard to be respected and takes great pride in her job. She often feuds with Potter due to the latter being outlandish and bizarre.

characters.name: Michael Ariza
characters.description: Michael "Riz" ArizaAppearancesFirst seen"Perro/Oc"Last seen"Hunahpu"Appearances20 Episodes(see below)Last mentioned"Death of the Virgin"DetailsStatusDeceasedDate of DeathAugust 17th 2020Cause of DeathAsphyxiated byChe RomeroFactionMayans Santo PadreTitleFull PatchEl Secretario(Formerly)Club StatusInactivePortrayed byAntonio JaramilloFamily TreeVicki Ariza† (Aunt)Michael "Riz" Arizawas the formerEl Secretario, of theMayans Motorcycle Club, Santo Padre charterand a major character onMayans MC, a spinoff based on theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by American actorAntonio Jaramillo, Riz makes his debut in the series' premiere episode, "Perro/Oc", inseason one; playing a recurring role throughout the same andfollowing season, until "Itzam-Ye", where he meets his demise. El Secretario(Formerly) Riz stands at 6' tall and has hazel eyes. Riz takes great pride in his appearance, which is often joked about by other Santo Padre members. He has smooth black shoulder length hair and a short stubbly moustache and beard. Riz has a large tattoo of "Mark 9:35" on his left forearm and also a portrait of a native Indian. On his right forearm, he has some scripture. He also has a large detailed crucifix on his upper chest.

characters.name: Armando
characters.description: ArmandoAppearancesFirst seen"Una Venta"Last seen"Family Recipe"Appearances2 episodes(see below)DetailsStatusDeceasedCause of DeathDecapitated by Cartel members off-screenGenderMaleFactionSAMTAZTitlePresidentClub StatusInactivePortrayed byLobo SebastianArmandowasPresidentof theSons of AnarchyTucson, Arizona Chapter, also known asSAMTAZ, on theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy.  Played by American actorLobo Sebastian, Armando makes his debut on the episode "Una Venta" in the series'fourthseason.  He appears once more, in the Season 4 episode "Family Recipe". He was beheaded by theLobos Sonora Cartel. The rest of his body was discovered in the back of a truck by the Sons of Anarchy with 3Mayans. His body was sent back to his club in Tucson along with his head.

characters.name: Kellan Ashby
characters.description: Kellan AshbyAppearancesFirst seen"Oiled"Last seen"Bainne"Appearances8 Episodes(see below)DetailsStatusDeceasedCause of DeathKilled byJimmy O'PhelanFactionSAMBELTrue IRAPortrayed byJames CosmoFamily TreeMaureen Ashby(Sister)Trinity Ashby(Niece)Keith McGee† (Brother-in-law)Cameron Hayes† (Cousin) FatherKellan Ashbywas the consigliere of theTrue IRAinBelfaston theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by Scottish actorJames Cosmo, Ashby makes his debut on the episode "Oiled" inseason three, playing a recurring role throughout the season, he met his demise in the episode "Bainne". Father Ashby is a calm and collected individual, respected by everyone in Ireland because of the fact that he is a priest. He also declined a position of power within the Vatican three times. He loved John Teller as a brother and sincerely wanted to make his wish come true: to protect his family from the life he had. Ashby also has great physical strength as he was able to throw the much younger Jax over a table.

characters.name: Maureen Ashby
characters.description: Maureen AshbyAppearancesFirst seen"SO"Last seen"Bainne"Appearances10 Episodes(see below)DetailsStatusAliveBirthdatec. 1970Marital StatusWidowedSpouse(s)Keith McGee†FactionSAMBELPortrayed byPaula MalcolmsonFamily TreeKellan Ashby† (Brother)Trinity Ashby(Daughter)Cameron Hayes† (Cousin)John Teller† (Ex-lover) Maureen Ashbyis the wife ofKeith McGeeon theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by Irish actressPaula Malcomson, Maureen makes her debut on theseason threeepisode "SO", playing a recurring role throughout the season, she was last seen in the episode "Bainne". Before her daughterTrinity Ashbywas born, Maureen had an affair withJohn "JT" Teller,Presidentof theSons of Anarchy Motorcycle Club, Redwood Original charterwhile he was still married to his wifeGemma Teller Morrow. The pair met due to the Sons getting in to the gun running business with theTrue IRA, of which Maureen was loosely associated by family. Despite objections to her affair, she continued seeing him and became pregnant at 18. She was convinced JT would have chosen to stay with her instead of Gemma, but he was killed and she would never know for sure. She lied to her daughter about who her father was, in hopes she wouldn't ask about her past.

characters.name: Trinity Ashby
characters.description: Trinity AshbyAppearancesFirst seen"Caregiver"Last seen"Bainne"Appearances7 Episodes(see below)DetailsStatusAliveBirthdate1988FactionSAMBELTrue IRAPortrayed byZoe BoyleFamily TreeMaureen Ashby(Mother)John Teller† (Father)Keith McGee† (Step father)Kellan Ashby† (Uncle)Jackson 'Jax' Teller† (Half brother)Thomas Teller† (Half brother)Abel Teller(Nephew)Thomas Teller II(Nephew)Trinity Ashbyis the daughter ofMaureen AshbyandJohn Telleron theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by English actressZoe Boyle, Trinity makes her debut on the episode "Caregiver", inseason three, playing a recurring role throughout the same season, she was last seen in the episode "Bainne". Trinity works in her mother's store inBelfast. She was almost intimate with Jax Teller but was interrupted by her mother andGemma. Maureen revealed to Trinity the truth aboutJohn Tellerbeing her biological father and her relation to Jax. UnnamedRussian- Shot in face inBratva.

characters.name: Asian Man
characters.description: Asian ManAppearancesFirst seen"Some Strange Eruption"Last seen"Some Strange Eruption"Appearances1 episode(see below)DetailsStatusDeceasedCause of DeathShot in the back and head by Juice OrtizGenderMalePortrayed byHidekun HahAsian Manis a man of Asian origin on theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy.  Played by Asian actorHidekun Hah, Asian Man was a citizen living inCharming, California, who met his demise during his only appearance, on the episode "Some Strange Eruption" in the series'seventh, and final,season. Asian Man is spotted byJuice Ortizwhen he is illegally spending his days in a hostel, hiding fromSAMCRO. The first time he sees Juice, he just leaves, but later he comes back with the keys (he seems to be the owner of the hostel) and enters the room, where he is attacked and killed by Juice. Later, his body is moved byWayne Unser. It seems Juice killed him because he looks like aLin Triadmember. ("Some Strange Eruption")

characters.name: Bachman
characters.description: BachmanAppearancesLast seen"Caregiver"Appearances1 Episode(see below)DetailsStatusAlivePortrayed byStephen King Bachmanis a "cleaner" on theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy. Played by American authorStephen King, he appears only on the episode "Caregiver" inseason three. Bachman is an independent "cleaner", an underground term for someone who illegally disposes of bodies and cleans crime scenes. Bachman is from Crescent City and charges between $2000 and $3000 per body, he is supposedly very good at what he does.

characters.description: BalianAppearancesFirst seen"Hands"Last seen"J'ai Obtenu Cette"Appearances4 episodes(see below)DetailsStatusAliveGenderMaleFactionSt. Thomas HospitalTitleDoctorPortrayed byMatt OrdunaBalianis a doctor on theFXoriginal seriesSons of Anarchy.  Played by American actorMatt Orduna, Balian makes his debut on the episode "Hands" in the series'fourthseason.  Playing a recurring role through the series' fourth andfifthseasons, Balian is a member of theMayansMC, works atSt. Thomas Hospital, and was last seen in the Season 5 episode "J'ai Obtenu Cette".
